results.title: CometChat Review: Real-Time Chat SDK with AI Agents ...
results.content:
### The Negatives

Support response times are the most common complaint. Several reviews mention waiting 2+ days for initial responses. For urgent issues, this can be frustrating.

Some users who purchased older plans feel burned by the shift to subscription pricing. If you bought a lifetime license years ago, the transition to monthly fees probably stings.

The UX could use refinement in some areas. A few reviewers noted that making CometChat look perfect in specific frameworks (like Ionic-Angular) requires extra work.

### The Verdict from Users [...] ### Chat and Messaging

The bread and butter here is solid. One-on-one conversations, group chats, broadcast channels—all the standard stuff you'd expect. But what separates decent chat from frustrating chat is the details: typing indicators that actually work, read receipts that don't lie, message threading that doesn't confuse users, reactions, the ability to edit or delete messages without breaking the conversation flow.

CometChat handles all of this out of the box. The message delivery is reliable thanks to queuing and retry mechanisms, which means your messages get through even when someone's connection is spotty.

### Voice and Video Calling [...] ### The Verdict from Users

Average ratings across platforms hover around 4-4.5 out of 5 stars. The platform clearly works and solves real problems, but like any software, it's not perfect. Most complaints center on support speed and pricing changes rather than core functionality.

## When CometChat Makes Sense (And When It Doesn't)

### Great Fit For:

Healthcare and Telehealth: HIPAA compliance is available on Advanced and Enterprise plans. Secure video consultations, patient-provider messaging, all the compliance boxes checked.

Marketplaces: Connect buyers and sellers with in-app chat. One reviewer running a marketplace saw a 25% boost in successful transactions after implementing CometChat.

results.title: Maximizing User Engagement and Communication with CometChat
results.content:
It’s important to note that end-to-end encryption only applies to messages sent through CometChat’s messaging features, not group chats or calls. This is to ensure that group conversations can be properly managed and moderated. CometChat also provides other security measures like the ability to ban a user, delete messages, and many other features that can help ensure the security of your app’s communication.

Get Started Now

## Some popular chat SDKs include CometChat, SendBird, Firebase, Pusher Chatkit, and Layer. [...] The chat SDK layer offers one-to-one, group, and file-sharing features. It also has a built-in user management system and supports various messaging protocols such as WebSockets and Long Polling. The layer’s pricing is based on the number of monthly active users and the number of messages sent. [...] When choosing a chat SDK, it’s important to consider the specific features you need for your app and the size of your user base. CometChat and SendBird may be the best options for video and voice calling. If you’re working on a small app with a limited number of users, Firebase may be a good choice. If you’re looking for a chat SDK with a built-in user management system, Pusher Chatkit and Layer might be worth considering. Ultimately, the best chat SDK for your app will depend on your specific requirements and budget.

Get Started Now

## In-app voice and video calling using CometChat

# CometChat SDK for Javascript

The CometChat SDK is a robust toolkit that developers can utilize to swiftly incorporate a reliable and fully-featured chat functionality into an existing or new application. It removes the complexity of building a chat infrastructure from scratch, thus accelerating the development process and reducing time to market.

## Prerequisites

`Visual Studio Code`
`npm`
